summary: Lead accepts the M7 UI/localization/visual quality-track plan after systems_architect REVIEW and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The plan is process/task-graph only: it creates and updates M7 task JSON so downstream UI/localization/visual quality work cannot bypass reviewed planning, while leaving product code, package code, content-source facts, save migration, release artifacts, telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud-save implementation, production art, and manual node battle behavior unchanged.

tests_run.result: VALID before lead acceptance state update.
No whitespace errors before lead acceptance state update.

decisions.decision: Accept the systems_architect plan and qa_reviewer ACCEPT for integration.
Downstream UI/localization implementation tasks remain blocked behind M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 closure; M7 content lock and M7 exit remain blocked behind M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001.
M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 remains dependency-ready and is not blocked by this UI/localization planning task.

Formal content lock, major cultural-risk decisions, cloud-save implementation, telemetry/accounts/secrets, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, irreversible migration, frozen architecture changes, release/commercial/branding, and manual node battle reversal remain Human Gates.

risks.summary: Existing platform/content/exit tasks inherit detailed visual/localization constraints through UI regression and UI localization exit tasks rather than restating every condition.
risks.mitigation: Keep M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-EXIT-001 as the evidence gate for detailed UI/localization constraints before content lock and M7 exit.

requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then close M7-UI-LOCALIZATION-PLAN-001 and continue dependency-ready M7 work.
